message:
🌱 Add node-exporter: Filesystems mounted while node exporter is running are not mission (#1750)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "node-exporter-474-filesystems-mounted-while-node-exporter-is-running-are-not-det",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "node-exporter: Filesystems mounted while node exporter is running are not detected",
+    "description": "Filesystems mounted while node exporter is running are not detected. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current node-exporter deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your node-exporter version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n node-exporter -l app.kubernetes.io/name=node-exporter\nhelm list -n node-exporter 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working node-exporter installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review node-exporter configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant node-exporter configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n node-exporter -l app.kubernetes.io/name=node-exporter\nkubectl get configmap -n node-exporter -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=node-exporter\n```\nMetrics did not show up for a new filesystem when I mounted it (waited for over an hour before investigating further). After restarting node-exporter, it appears fine."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Filesystems mounted while node exporter is running are not…",
+        "description": "fix #474\n```yaml\ndocker run -d -p 9100:9100 \\\n  -v \"/proc:/host/proc:ro\" \\\n  -v \"/sys:/host/sys:ro\" \\\n  -v \"/:/rootfs:ro\" \\\n  --net=\"host\" \\\n  quay.io/prometheus/node-exporter \\\n    --collector.procfs /host/proc \\\n    --collector.sysfs /host/sys \\\n    --collector.filesystem.ignored-mount-points \"^/(sys|proc|dev|host|etc)($|/)\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n node-exporter -l app.kubernetes.io/name=node-exporter\nkubectl get events -n node-exporter --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Filesystems mounted while node exporter is running are not…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter/pull/660",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "docker run -d -p 9100:9100 \\\n  -v \"/proc:/host/proc:ro\" \\\n  -v \"/sys:/host/sys:ro\" \\\n  -v \"/:/rootfs:ro\" \\\n  --net=\"host\" \\\n  quay.io/prometheus/node-exporter \\\n    --collector.procfs /host/proc \\\n    --collector.sysfs /host/sys \\\n    --collector.filesystem.ignored-mount-points \"^/(sys|proc|dev|host|etc)($|/)\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "node-exporter",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "node-exporter"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter/issues/474",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter/pull/660"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 9,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with node-exporter installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
